title: Claim
description: A normalized claim object produced by the Claim Engine from raw input (FR-002). Forward contract: defines the shape now so producers/consumers agree; the Claim Engine is a later vertical.

ClaimType.title: ClaimType
ClaimType.description: Claim-type taxonomy that drives downstream handling. Empirical claims are verifiable facts; legal/definitional/normative claims are NOT adjudicated as truth by the Trust Engine.

targets.description: Entities asserted to be acted upon.

dates.description: Dates/intervals referenced (ISO-8601 where known, else free text).

assertions.description: Atomic assertions extracted from the claim text.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag of the source (e.g. ar, he, en).

source_url.description: Origin URL, if the claim came from a web source.
